pet.name: Pepper
pet.breedColor: a tri-colour guinea pig with a white blaze, a caramel saddle, and a swirl of black around one ear

memories.quirks: the little burst of happy squeaks you make the second you hear the fridge open
memories.favoriteRitual: our breakfast handoff — a sprig of parsley over the side of the hutch, every single morning
memories.favoriteSpots: the cosy fleece tunnel by the window where the afternoon sun pools
memories.favoriteActivity: popcorning across the rug like the floor is made of springs
memories.nicknames: Pep, Sir Pepper, the little potato
